[PUBLISHED DATE]: July 25, 2025
[TITLE]: VIRAL: Photo of orphan lying in mother's chalk outline | PEP.ph
[METADATA/INTRO]: Nakakaantig ng damdamin ang larawang ibinahagi ng Facebook page na Today i Learned, na nagtatampok ng interesting stories mula sa iba’t ibang bahagi ng mundo. Noong July 25, 2025, nag-post ito ng photo ng isang bata na nakahiga sa sementadong...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Dagdag pa ni Bahareh at paglilinaw: “I used a chair to stand on in order to take this shot. 
 “There is no orphanage involved and no tragic story behind this. I took this opportunity to be creative.” 
 Ibinahagi rin ni Bahareh na big fan siya ng ganitong style of photography. 
 Kabilang ito sa kanyang album kung saan tampok ang bird's eye view ng batang babae na nasa loob ng iba’t ibang chalk drawings. 
 Ang nag-viral na version ay ini-upload sa Instagram ng user na may handle na @arte_metaverse last February 24, 2025. 
 At bagama’t 2012 pa nakunan ni Bahareh ang original photo at iba’t iba ang naging kalakip na kuwento sa social media, pinatunayan ng imahe ang isang malakas na mensahe—na sa kabila ng kaguluhan sa mundo, nananatiling may malasakit sa puso ng mga tao.

[TITLE]: 16 ideas de Familia | madre arte, pintura de madre e hijo, amor de madre
[METADATA/INTRO]: 🪷 Una impresión artística de alta calidad de mi obra de arte original pintada a mano “Angel Dream”. Cada lámina está firmada y sellada por el artista en la parte posterior para garantizar su autenticidad y valor para los coleccionistas....
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: 🪷 Una impresión artística de alta calidad de mi obra de arte original pintada a mano “Angel Dream”. 
 Cada lámina está firmada y sellada por el artista en la parte posterior para garantizar su autenticidad y valor para los coleccionistas. 
 Estás eligiendo una lámina hecha a mano por encargo, de calidad de coleccionista, de la artista Eva Campbell (propietaria de esta tienda). 🪷 Materiales disponibles 
 Puedes elegir entre papel grueso con textura de lino o lienzo brillante aterciopelado.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2013-03-07
[TITLE]: The Cult of Juvenescence | Style and a Story
[METADATA/INTRO]: Lately I have really been getting into photography, especially since I am going through an anxious period. Photos seem to reassure me and allow me to temporarily escape from my fears. Since literally a baby myself, I have loved infants,...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Lately I have really been getting into photography, especially since I am going through an anxious period. Photos seem to reassure me and allow me to temporarily escape from my fears. Since literally a baby myself, I have loved infants, and so I have found refuge in scrolling through striking pictures of children; children exude peace, purity, and innocence, making them great sources of enlightenment and comfort. Here are my favorite images:
